commit.message:
Refactor docs tooling into reusable helpers

- move documentation index/search helpers into tenzir_mcp.docs and slim down server tooling
- add workflow modules and shared FastMCP app wiring so workflows register cleanly with tags and structured outputs
- introduce scripts/build_doc_index.py, ignore the generated doc_index.json, and build the index during CI runs
- refresh README, CLAUDE, AGENTS, and reference docs; update modularization plans; extend pytest coverage for docs tools
